name: Family Favorite Fudge Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup salted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees F (150 degrees C).
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a saucepan, melt together baking chocolate and butter over medium-low heat, stirring until almost melted. Remove from heat and stir until smooth.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs on medium speed until light and fluffy and light yellow in color. Add sugar and blend on low until well mixed.
5. Add vanilla and almond extracts to the eggs and mix well.
6. Add flour and instant coffee crystals and blend until smooth. Pour batter into the pan and smooth the surface.
7. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and bake for 45-50 minutes in the center rack of the oven, until the batter is set and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Do not overcook.
8. Allow to cool to room temperature and chill for about 1 hour before cutting.
